channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 8 Throwley Close: children’s toys., 18th April
item.description:
Toys are at side of wheeled bins.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Throwley Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant amount of household waste, 18th April
item.description:
Household waste dumped in front, to the side and at rear of the flats, public bin also full, ongoing issue for many months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress behind lamp post, 18th April
item.description:
Mattress stuffed behind lamp post on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Lion Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tonnes of litter behind the fence, 18th April
item.description:
The bus stop is always covered in rubbish and some of it is thrown behind the fence. Please clean up as it’s a green area and it shouldn’t look like this. Shame

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recurring pothole just north of Carlton Rd bus stop, 18th April
item.description:
This is coming back again. Can you fix it properly this time?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Elm Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young sycamore tree, 18th April
item.description:
This young sycamore is growing fast. It is within inches of the pavement. It needs to be removed as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grassington Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypstering, 18th April
item.description:
Brenchley Gardens. Remove flypostering from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th April
item.description:
More fly tipping in same location as always.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 18th April
item.description:
One Tree Hill Remove graffiti from litter bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One Tree Hill, 18th April
item.description:
Remove stickers from cycle barrier at Entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo again, 18th April
item.description:
A trial of dog poo along the footpath leading from Milwood Road to Brantwood Way. This is becoming a considerable problem for our area please install a bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Millwood Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Replace with fox proof bin, 18th April
item.description:
This bin is routinely disturbed by wind and foxes leaving litter a over the children’s playground - simply replace with a more appropriate bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, 18th April
item.description:
The tree is blocking the light, the roots are causing cracks in our hallway, the sap a seeds are causing damage to the cars parked underneath. Branches are pulling on cables. And it’s aggravating my husband’s and my son’s hay fever

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clowders Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in the road on Yarnton Way/Norman Road area, 18th April
item.description:
Dead fox in road on Yarnton Way, across from The Morgan pub
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarnton Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By junction Claremont and Kilburn lane, 18th April
item.description:
Dumped food on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide litter, 18th April
item.description:
Nitrous oxide containers left on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Theydon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood (wooden sign) left on Seal Street E8, 18th April
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped wood (wooden sign) on Seal Street E8 pedestrian section. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa on street, 18th April
item.description:
Sofa and other goods flytipped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Pavement lift, 18th April
item.description:
Pavement lifting possibly due to tree root? Insecure blocks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ernest Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
